```console
$ docker pull nextcloud@sha256:639651b85c5c58335c5648551cc18c116853a24b6167e28abbca6fe41522b49b

-	Docker Version: 20.10.7
-	Manifest MIME: `application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json`
-	Total Size: **286.1 MB (286090837 bytes)**  
	(compressed transfer size, not on-disk size)

```console
$ docker pull nextcloud@sha256:e06a92f439deee5bde6a5858f31c69d81549dd5d989e23d4f5a269bffe6a64e7

-	Manifest MIME: `application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json`
-	Total Size: **336.1 MB (336091527 bytes)**  
	(compressed transfer size, not on-disk size)
